mapper.select:
SELECT pbr.id, pbr.user_id, pbr.product_id, pbr.product_name, pbr.product_type, pbr.investment_amount, pbr.income_amount, pbr.income_rate, pbr.income_date, pbr.income_type, pbr.status, pbr.remark, pbr.created_at, pbr.updated_at,
wmp.product_name, wmp.product_type, wmp.risk_level FROM product_income_record pir LEFT JOIN wealth_management_product wmp ON (wmp.id = pir.product_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND wmp.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.productName},'%')
ORDER BY pir.created_at DESC
